title: networking: fix segfault when slirp4netns is missing
body:
fixes a segfault when slirp4netns is not installed and the slirp sync pipe is not created.
  
Closes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/4113

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

added another patch that fixes a different segfault when trying to refresh CNI plugins in rootless mode.

I think we should get this in for the release

Little late for 1.6.0, tag is made. We'll probably need a 1.6.1.
